---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Ingest event payload '...' to `/api/v1/events/...`
2. Run database query or query metrics endpoint `/api/v1/metrics/...`
3. See error stack or incorrect response

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Operational Logs & Traces
If applicable, add stack traces, logs, Jaeger traces, or Prometheus metrics to help analyze the issue.

## Environment Context
- OS: (e.g. macOS, Ubuntu)
- Java version: (e.g. JDK 21)
- Docker Desktop version: (e.g. 4.29)
